title: Modules, Packages, Environments, and Command Lines · Runtime Lens: Python Module Api
summary: Turn the reporting pipeline into an installable and repeatable command-line tool. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python module api increment in an installable data-report command. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Organize public module functions, constants, docstrings, and private implementation names around stable responsibilities.
Explain module search, import caching, names, qualified access, and circular-import failure conditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
